case_title: ANNA FAIRBANK VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY FAIRBANK, ANNA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED APR-11-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-10-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-10-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. REMY WEILAND APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT, WHO WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2012 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAIRBANK, ANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $430.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
